clips.label: HOOK CLIP
clips.detailed_prompt: SUBJECT: A 7-year-old school-age child with warm medium-brown skin, dark brown eyes, dark brown hair, wearing a soft red cotton t-shirt and denim blue jeans, is sitting on a sofa. A Latina woman in her early 30s with warm medium-brown skin, dark brown wavy hair in a loose ponytail, dark brown eyes, wearing a soft terracotta cardigan over a white tee, is the primary parent. SETTING: A warm, lived-in US Hispanic/Latino household, with natural window light illuminating the scene. ACTION: The Latina woman parent gently places her ear on the back of the 7-year-old child. MOOD: Tense. CAMERA: Gentle handheld. LIGHTING: Dark and moody. STYLE: Cinematic realistic footage. 4K. Natural colors. No animation. No text on screen.
clips.veo_prompt: A 7-year-old school-age child with warm medium-brown skin, dark brown eyes, dark brown hair, wearing a soft red cotton t-shirt and denim blue jeans, is sitting on a sofa in a warm, lived-in US Hispanic/Latino household. A Latina woman in her early 30s, the primary parent, with warm medium-brown skin, dark brown wavy hair in a loose ponytail, dark brown eyes, wearing a soft terracotta cardigan over a white tee, gently places her ear on the child's back. The scene is captured with a gentle handheld camera, under dark and moody natural window light, creating a tense mood. Cinematic realistic footage, 4K, natural colors, no animation, no text on screen.
